---
applyTo: "**/*.{php,ts,tsx,js,jsx,md,yml,yaml,ps1,sh}"
---

# Commenting Instructions

- Prefer self-explanatory code and concise names.
- Add comments only when the reasoning is not obvious from code.
- Keep comments factual and aligned with current behavior.
- Remove stale comments when behavior changes.
- Do not add decorative or redundant comments.
